summary: compare drops the never-populated est_cost_usd field and the 'cost' claim from every surface, emits prompt_hash (matching the advisor log), surfaces --prompt-file read errors, and honors --timeout via a per-request context.
reason: PR #805 review: compare advertised side-by-side cost it never produced, documented a prompt_hash absent from output, swallowed prompt-read errors behind a generic message, and ignored --timeout.
validated_outcome: go test ./... ; grep confirms no 'cost' claim remains on any compare surface
